blocks.text: Berge takes the armband — Norway face Netherlands today
Solbakken promises lineup surprises against a dangerous Dutch side. Berge as captain adds weight to a fixture that could define Norway's qualification campaign.
🏎️ Fri — Suzuka Japanese GP, Russell leads the 2026 F1 title race [★4]
